title: Quantifying carbon emissions for local transport planning
body: "Practical guidance on how local authorities can apply carbon analysis to inform the development and quantify the carbon impacts of their transport strategies and schemes.  This document provides guidance on:   how and when carbon analysis can be integrated into the process of developing transport strategies and schemes different methods for assessing carbon impacts, including the methodologies and datasets that can be used   It is a foundation from which carbon analysis methods and data can continue to be developed by the Department for Transport and the sector. "
